mdRecord.dcterms:title: James C. Biddle to Gertrude G. Biddle, April 26, 1863
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Major James C. Biddle writes to Gertrude G. Biddle from 5th Corps Head Quarters [Stoneman's Station, Virginia], discussing military news, frustrations with government policies, and financial matters.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Civil War
United States--History--Civil War, 1861-1900
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
mdRecord.dcterms:creator: Biddle, James C.
